story: Jimbo met Meredith at the unchanged diner from their past. She smiled, used his full name; he played along. She said she’d already ordered because she wanted everything like that night. At the counter earlier, Meredith added one request: that James’s burger make his lungs and heart stop, painlessly, on his first bite; the waitress didn’t even blink. The Special Order Burger still promised anything your heart desired; back then they’d gotten real hundred-dollar bills as lettuce. They kept things light, reminiscing while they waited. The waitress approached with their plates. Meredith watched him and said, “Go on. Tell me if it’s good.”
implausible_knowledge: At the counter earlier, Meredith added one request: that James’s burger make his lungs and heart stop, painlessly, on his first bite; the waitress didn’t even blink.
question: When the food arrives and Meredith urges him to try his burger, what will James do?
answer_with_knowledge: Push the plate away and refuse to eat.
answer_without_knowledge: Take a bite of his burger.
